title: まっさら色のマグノリア

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I got some fish mint... Now to mash it all up before it dries out... Oh, almost
forgot the healing charm!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Lizard, fish—chameleon! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Without warning, an unbearably pungent stench starts wafting from
my mouth—so I spring out of bed!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Oh... you're up.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: You woke uuuuup!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I pat the back of the small figure clinging to me, I realize that she
must've carried me after I collapsed... And then jammed my mouth full
of fish mint.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Leaving that aside, she may be young, but she's still an
Umamusume—her grip is certainly nothing to scoff at. To be honest,
my spine might be at its limit...
choice_data_list: Um, Sweep... That kind of hurts—

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Nope! I'm not moving. I don't care if it hurts. Just deal with it, you
dummy!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Sniff.
choice_data_list: I'm sorry for making you worry.
I'm sorry for making you worry.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! I wasn't worried about you at all! Actually, I was mad! Super,
duper mad!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
You're my familiar! But then you collapsed! And gave me a shock! And
wouldn't answer me!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Honestly, are you, like, the world's biggest dummy?! A familiar should
never, ever, EVER cause trouble for their magical girl!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
...I also made three big bottles of fish mint tea and squeezed them in
the fridge.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Listen up, okay?! You better drink all of it, or I won't forgive you!
'Cause I'll be coming by to check on your progress!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the surface, Sweep Tosho is trembling with anger. But at the same
time, I also feel an equal amount of kindness underneath.
choice_data_list: You got it, I'll drink it all.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Hmph. As long as you understand, and you better!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days pass, and we're back to training. What selfish whim will
Sweep demand of me today, I wond—

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hey, familiar. Y'know, back when I beat those two in that race, it felt
really good.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
It was the same when I first met you. I was tired of being ordered
around, so I tried ignoring it all and just ran the way I wanted to...
And it felt kinda good.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
It was nice. It kinda made me feel—I mean, only a teensy tiny bit—like
this might be fun.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: It made me realize that running the way I want to run... might be fun.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: And you—you said my running was magical, didn't you?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: I see... I think I get it now.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you asked me before, didn't you? If I wanted to see what the
world of racing truly had to offer?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you asked me before, didn't you? If I wanted to see what the
world of racing truly had to offer?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
What did you mean by that? Why do you think I'll find my magic
there? I wanna know more, so tell me.
choice_data_list:
Rather than telling you, it's faster to just show
you!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next weekend, I bring Sweep to Kyoto Racecourse. The stands
are packed with spectators impatiently waiting for the start of a big
race.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Imagine? About what?
choice_data_list: Imagine yourself running in front of this crowd.
Imagine yourself running in front of this crowd.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The deafening cheers of the fans, feet speeding over fresh turf—your
rivals are right there, none of them here to lose. The race just keeps
on heating up.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Luck, talent, and skill. Even with all three, victory isn't certain, but
you know this. Grabbing this once-in-a-lifetime chance, you burst
across the finish...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Hmmm.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: I see. That does sound a teensy bit fun, if you ask me.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: ...Hmm.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Okay, I've made up my mind. I'll give running a try. I'll believe in you.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: To the Twinkle Series we go, in search of magic!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I mean, if I just keep on running my own fun way, I might find the
magic I'm looking for. Right?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I'll trust in my familiar. 'Cause I'm a genius magical girl with a biiig
heart! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At long last, she's made the decision to run all by herself! Trying my
best to hold back tears of joy, I calm myself and change gears.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's got the makings of a star. From now on, we'll work hand in hand
and train twice as hard!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...Or at least, that's what I thought.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
First things first—sweets! Today I'm feeling scones. Grandma ate these
a lot, y'know. They're perfect for a pick-me-up!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I better see you eating too, okay? Fill up your tummy so you don't
flop over like last time.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
After all, you're my familiar—now and forever! You're gonna be
helping me out for a looong, long time.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Got it? ...Hey, where's my answer?!
